DP.017.0000:
Dawn: Hi, [0103,0001]!
Are you catching Pokémon?\f
DP.017.0001:
Wow! You’ve already got [0132,0000] Pokémon
with you!\f
At that pace, your Pokédex should
be full in no time at all!\f
DP.017.0002:
...Um...\f
I think you’d feel a lot safer if you
were to catch some more.\f
DP.017.0004:
In Jubilife City, there’s the Trainers’
School, which... Well, you know.\f
[0103,0000], you should visit it.
You’ll get some tips on Pokémon.\f
Oh yes, [0103,0001] went to the
Trainers’ School earlier.\f
OK, bye now!\f
DP.017.0005:
Lucas: Hey, [0103,0001]!
How many Pokémon have you caught?\f
DP.017.0006:
Whoa! You already have [0132,0000] Pokémon
with you!\f
DP.017.0007:
Huh?
I think you should catch some more.\f
It might be more of a challenge
raising a lot of Pokémon...\f
But it’s worth it. The more Pokémon
you have, the happier you’ll be.\f
DP.017.0009:
In Jubilife City, there’s the Trainers’
School. Check it out, [0103,0000].\f
Oh yeah, [0103,0001] went to the
Trainers’ School earlier.\f
OK, see you around!
Work hard on your Pokédex!\f
DP.017.0010:
Jubilife City’s built on land they
carved out of a mountain.\f
The people and Pokémon of
Oreburgh City helped out with\r
that undertaking.
DP.017.0011:
Hello! Let me ask you, have you paid
a visit to the TV station?\f
If you’ve never been, you owe it to
yourself to make the trip.\f
And, if you’ve been there before,
it never hurts to visit again.\f
After all, you can be a star!
Or at least dream of being one!
DP.017.0012:
Jubilife City is the love of my life.
Words can’t do it justice.\f
DP.017.0013:
By the way, have you visited the
Trainers’ School?\f
Not yet, right?
You really must visit there!\f
DP.017.0015:
By the way, have you participated
in the Pokétch campaign?\f
Not yet, right?
You really must try!\f
DP.017.0016:
Hello! Yes, you!
You with that cool scarf!\f
You should have seen the boy that
came running by earlier.\f
He ran past me so quickly, I couldn’t
even manage a hello.
DP.017.0017:
Jubilife City is a big place.
Take your time sightseeing.
DP.017.0018:
Jubilife City is the love of my life
Words can’t do it justice.
DP.017.0019:
By the way, have you visited the
Trainers’ School?\f
Not yet, right?
You really must visit there!
DP.017.0020:
By the way, have you participated
in the Pokétch campaign?\f
Not yet, right?
You really must try!
DP.017.0021:
Oh, oh, oh?\f
You call yourself a Pokémon Trainer?
And yet you have no Pokétch?\f
That is, Pokémon Watch, or Pokétch
for short!\f
Oh my, you are a rare case
indeed!\f
DP.017.0022:
You see, I invented, and now
manufacture, Pokétches.\f
Not only that, I’m now conducting
the Pokétch promotional campaign!\f
All you have to do is find three
clowns in Jubilife City.\f
If you can find them...
I will gift you with a Pokétch!
DP.017.0023:
The three clowns will each ask you
a skill-testing question.\f
The questions will all have to do
with Pokémon.\f
After all, a Pokétch is a tool for
Pokémon Trainers.\f
Collect a Coupon from each clown,
then come see me, OK?
DP.017.0024:
OK, let me count your Coupons!
I’ll use the Pokétch here...\f
One, two, three!
Bravo! I say, bravo!\f
In return for these Coupons,
I present you this Pokémon Watch,\r
or Pokétch for short!\f
DP.017.0026:
You can add apps to your Pokétch
to make it even more versatile!\f
Touch the Pokétch screen and please
do try it out!\f
DP.017.0027:
Hi! I’m a Pokétch campaign clown!
Let’s roll out my question!\f
Does a Pokémon grow by defeating
others and gaining Exp. Points?
DP.017.0030:
Pokémon grow stronger by defeating
other Pokémon in battle.\f
Some Pokémon even grow into an
entirely different form in a process\r
known as evolution.\f
DP.017.0031:
Here you go!
Your Pokétch Coupon!\f
DP.017.0032:
Pokémon grow stronger through
battling.\f
Some Pokémon even grow into an
entirely different form in a process\r
known as evolution.
DP.017.0033:
Hi! I’m a Pokétch campaign clown!
Let’s roll out my question!\f
Just like Pokémon types, the moves
of Pokémon also have types?
DP.017.0036:
If the Pokémon’s type matches its
move’s type, that move is made much\r
more powerful!\f
DP.017.0037:
Here you go!
Your Pokétch Coupon!\f
DP.017.0038:
If the Pokémon’s type matches its
move’s type, that move is made much\r
more powerful!
DP.017.0039:
Hi! I’m a Pokétch campaign clown!
Let’s roll out my question!\f
Can a Pokémon hold an item?
DP.017.0042:
A Pokémon may hold a single item.\f
Some items become effective as soon
as they are held by a Pokémon.\f
Berries are eaten by Pokémon as
necessary during battle.\f
DP.017.0043:
Here you go!
Your Pokétch Coupon!\f
DP.017.0044:
Hi, there. You should stick around.
We’re doing a Pokétch campaign soon.\f
Before it starts, I think you should
brush up at the Trainers’ School.
DP.017.0045:
A Pokémon may hold a single item.\f
Some items become effective as soon
as they are held by Pokémon.\f
Berries are eaten by Pokémon as
necessary during battle.
DP.017.0046:
Rowan: Ah, [0103,0000].
Impeccable timing as always.\f
These miscreants are babbling utter
nonsense that I just can’t stomach.\f
Show them some manners, if you will.\f
DP.017.0047:
Mystery man: Oh, Professor Pokémon,
must you be so difficult?\f
We are approaching you strictly
as businessmen.\f
All you must do is provide us with
all your research findings.\f
In return, we’ll refrain from causing
massive damage to your assistant.\f
DP.017.0048:
Dawn: [0103,0001]!\f
Let’s battle together and teach
these horrible men a lesson!\f
DP.017.0049:
Lucas: [0103,0001]!
Join me and battle these guys!\f
DP.017.0050:
Grunt: You leave us no option.
We will retreat for now.\f
Because Team Galactic is benevolent
to all, we shall leave.\f
DP.017.0051:
Rowan: That lot...
They called themselves Team Galactic.\f
When Pokémon evolve, they seem to
release some type of energy...\f
However, I believe that it’s a mystic
power far beyond our control.\f
But Team Galactic seems to be trying
to use that power for something...\f
Anyway, [0103,0000], well done!
You battle quite capably.\f
The sight of you Trainers and Pokémon
battling together...\f
I made the right decision in
entrusting you with a Pokédex!\f
DP.017.0055:
Dawn: [0103,0001], did you know?\f
The professor studies the evolution
of Pokémon, too.\f
According to his research, 90% of
all Pokémon are somehow tied\r
to evolution!\f
I guess that means some Pokémon
must undergo startling evolutions.\f
So, [0103,0001]...
Let’s keep working on our Pokédex\r
project for the professor!\f
DP.017.0056:
Lucas: [0103,0001], did you know
about this?\f
The professor studies about the
evolution of Pokémon, too.\f
According to his research, 90% of
all Pokémon are somehow tied\r
to evolution!\f
I guess that means some Pokémon
must undergo weird evolutions.\f
So, [0103,0001]...
Let’s keep working on our Pokédex\r
project for the prof!\f
DP.017.0057:
Oh, that was very good!
Nicely done! Truly excellent!\f
Oh, I beg your pardon, I’m from
Jubilife TV!\f
I’d like you to have something for
letting me see that smashing battle!\f
DP.017.0058:
Contained within that Fashion Case...\f
You will find a whole spectrum of chic
Accessories and tasteful Backdrops!\f
Dress up your Pokémon and watch
their appeal grow!\f
And, right now the TV station is
offering its facilities so visitors\r
can dress up their Pokémon!\f
There are also prize giveaways, too!
Please do visit our TV station!\f
DP.017.0059:
The way you look...
You’re obviously a Trainer!\f
Can you tell me what type of Pokémon
you like?
DP.017.0060:
The Fire type?
You must have a fiery personality.
DP.017.0061:
A person that likes the Water type
must be somewhat cool.
DP.017.0062:
You chose the Grass type?
No wonder you look so calm.
DP.017.0063:
Did you see me on TV?
I was in an interview!
DP.017.0064:
When you walk with your Pokémon,
they gradually grow friendlier.
DP.017.0065:
OK, set six Poké Balls in my
belt...\f
Yeah, that’ll do it. At most, you
can have six Pokémon with you.
DP.017.0067:
Hiya, where’d you come from?\f
...\f
Twinleaf Town, huh...
It’s a nice place. Quiet and all.\f
Jubilife City is a big place, so it
might be a bit of a shock to you.
DP.017.0068:
Hello, Trainer!
Do you know much about Pokémon?
DP.017.0069:
Ah, I see!
You are knowledgeable!\f
I imagine you wouldn’t see the need
to visit the Trainers’ School, then.\f
But do visit if you have the time.
You may discover something new!
DP.017.0070:
Oh, you’re not knowledgeable...
But not to worry!\r
There’s the Trainers’ School.\f
The school will teach you the
basics of Pokémon.
DP.017.0071:
Past here is the GTS, which stands
for Global Trade Station.\f
Oh, I’m sorry, you don’t have
any Gym Badges.\f
The GTS is off-limits if you don’t
have a Gym Badge. Sorry!\f
DP.017.0072:
Past here is the GTS, which stands
for Global Trade Station.\f
Trading Pokémon means connecting
with friends, both old and new.\f
That’s awesome!
DP.017.0073: I’m trading Pokémon with my buddy!
DP.017.0074:
I made my Pokémon hold an item
before trading it.\f
That will make the other Trainer
double happy!
DP.017.0077:
The Pokétch Company
Pokémon Watches for the World!
DP.017.0078:
Trainers’ School
The First Step for Trainers!
DP.017.0079:
Jubilife TV
The Fun-and-Games TV Station!
DP.017.0080:
Global Trade Station
Worldwide Pokémon Trading!
